channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT This Week in India
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in India — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Pritam and Pedro — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — The dynamic between the two contrasting personalities, a seasoned cop who prefers old-school methods and a tech-savvy cop who relies on modern technology for…

item.title: Ikka — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — With a loved one's life at stake, a celebrated lawyer must defend a man he suspects is guilty — battling his conscience every step of the way.

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

item.title: Idhayam Murali — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Tamil · Just released — verdict soon — A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…

item.title: Double Occupancy — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Tamil · Not enough ratings yet — Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Alpha — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen…

item.title: Nagabandham: The Secret Treasure — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — A chosen warrior protects a mystical, serpent-bound Himalayan temple from those seeking to steal the power of the Brahma Kamalam, a divine relic.

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: The Bear — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — JioHotstar
item.description: JioHotstar · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Raakh — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — When two teenagers vanish, a close-knit family is shattered and the city is left on edge. Determined to uncover the truth, a relentless officer leads a…
